name: Butterfinger Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the cake in a 9x13 pan according to the package instructions.
2. Allow the cake to cool completely before proceeding.
3. Crush the Butterfinger bars and reserve half for later use.
4. Mix the remaining Butterfinger pieces with the Cool Whip and pecans until combined.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the cooled cake layer.
6. Place the reserved Butterfinger pieces on top of the frosting.
7. Refrigerate the cake until ready to serve.
